mapper.insert: insert into fund_nav (id, fund_code, nav_date, unit_nav, acc_nav, growth_rate, subscribe_status, redeem_status, bonus, create_time, update_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{fundCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{navDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{unitNav,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{accNav,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{growthRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{subscribeStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{redeemStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bonus,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update: update fund_nav set fund_code = #{fundCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, nav_date = #{navDate,jdbcType=DATE}, unit_nav = #{unitNav,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, acc_nav = #{accNav,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, growth_rate = #{growthRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, subscribe_status = #{subscribeStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, redeem_status = #{redeemStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bonus = #{bonus,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select id, fund_code, nav_date, unit_nav, acc_nav, growth_rate, subscribe_status, redeem_status, bonus, create_time, update_time from fund_nav where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
select id, fund_code, nav_date, unit_nav, acc_nav, growth_rate, subscribe_status, redeem_status, bonus, create_time, update_time from fund_nav
